evals.prompt: Audit this Rust service: uses println! for all logging, no /metrics endpoint, no health endpoints, no tracing setup.
evals.expected_output: Audit flagging all 4 gaps as blocking, specific recommendations per gap, FAIL verdict
expectations: println! flagged — must use tracing crate with structured fields
No /metrics flagged as blocking — must expose Prometheus metrics
No health endpoints flagged — must add /health/live and /health/ready
No tracing flagged — must configure OTEL exporter

evals.prompt: Audit alert rules for an order service. Current alerts: 'CPU > 80% for 5min'. No latency or error rate alerts.
evals.expected_output: Alert audit identifying missing SLO-based alerts, recommendations for RED metric alerts
expectations: CPU alert noted as insufficient — not SLO-based
Missing: domain metric alert (orders_confirmed_total no increase)
